## Diagnostics

Attach or paste Data > Diagnostics when relevant. Diagnostics are preferred
because they omit world content by default.

Do not attach JSON backups, Markdown exports, screenshots of private records, or
pasted localStorage values unless you intentionally want to share world content.

## Validation Tried

- Refreshed the page: yes/no
- Exported JSON successfully: yes/no
- Reproduced in a clean browser profile: yes/no
